chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1794 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 18-09-2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Khan Leghari, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>>..<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed, therefore, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
